stances.label: Routine Service
stances.summary: Routine Service. Follow the column and keep your kit ready.
stances.preview: Default soldier routine. No special path bias.
stances.tooltip: Default posture. Wages and ordinary duty continue; orders override it.

stances.label: Drill with the Line
stances.summary: Drill with the Line. You spend spare hours under the sergeant's eye.
stances.preview: Small combat and Athletics drift. Readiness may improve. Fatigue and training-injury risk.
stances.tooltip: Improve fighting competence over time. Minor XP drift, readiness help, fatigue risk.

stances.label: Scout Ahead
stances.summary: Scout Ahead. You keep an eye on roads, tracks, and bad ground.
stances.preview: Scouting and Riding drift. Ranger path bias. Risk of patrol trouble or bad reports.
stances.tooltip: Lean into reconnaissance. Scouting/Riding drift, ranger bias, patrol risk.

stances.label: Stay Close to the Lord
stances.summary: Stay Close to the Lord. You remain useful near command.
stances.preview: Small relation or rank-XP chances. Political errands and favoritism backlash risk.
stances.tooltip: Build proximity and trust. Relation/rank chances, political complications.

stances.label: Keep Your Head Down
stances.summary: Keep Your Head Down. You avoid notice and do only what is required.
stances.preview: Slow scrutiny relief and fewer social openings. Risk of being marked as shirking.
stances.tooltip: Avoid attention. Slow scrutiny relief, fewer openings, shirking risk.

stances.label: Help the Wounded
stances.summary: Help the Wounded. You spend spare hours near the surgeon and sick tents.
stances.preview: Medicine drift and recovery help. Fever, supply shortage, and mercy-choice risks.
stances.tooltip: Support the wounded. Medicine drift, recovery help, medical interruption risk.

stances.label: Forage and Hustle
stances.summary: Forage and Hustle. You look for food, coin, and useful gaps.
stances.preview: Supplies may stabilize and tiny gold chances appear. Rogue edge and accusation risk.
stances.tooltip: Work the margins. Supply help, tiny gold chance, rogue bias, accusation risk.
